text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Shuka Sho and Fine Motion's
immense popularity has made her the center of
attention. Faced with all the crowd's
expectations, she suddenly darts off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out she's concerned that she'll fail to live
up to everyone's expectations of her if she allows
herself to run purely for the fun of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that it's not nobility people want from
her, it's to see her enjoying herself as she runs.
Fine Motion makes up her mind to run with pure
joy as her utmost priority.
